verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Many are they increased that trouble me, Many are they that rise up against me Many are they which say of my soul There is no hlp for him in God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: (But thou Oh! Lord Are a shield for me My glory and the lifter of my head)*2

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I cried unto the Lord with my voie And he heard me out of his holy hill I laid me down and slept and awaked For the Lord sustained, for he sustained me!
